title: 30 Tex. Admin. Code § 101.1 - Definitions
text:
Unless specifically defined in the Texas Clean Air Act
(TCAA) or in the rules of the commission, the terms used by the commission have
the meanings commonly ascribed to them in the field of air pollution control.
In addition to the terms that are defined by the TCAA, the following terms,
when used in the air quality rules in this title, have the following meanings,
unless the context clearly indicates otherwise.

(1) Account--For those sources required to be
permitted under Chapter 122 of this title (relating to Federal Operating
Permits Program), all sources that are aggregated as a site. For all other
sources, any combination of sources under common ownership or control and
located on one or more contiguous properties, or properties contiguous except
for intervening roads, railroads, rights-of-way, waterways, or similar
divisions.
